summary: Contact Edit/Save Bug Fix Verified - All features working. User's reported issue (Save button does nothing when editing contact) has been FIXED. Tested: Edit button shows Cancel+Save buttons (gold prominent), Save persists changes and shows 'Contact saved!' toast, Cancel discards changes, backend PUT /api/contacts works with phone OR email (relaxed validation), PATCH /api/contacts/{id}/profile-photo works.

edit_button_shows_form.details: Clicking Edit button opens form with Cancel and Save buttons. Save button has gold/yellow (#C9A962) background making it prominent.

save_button_persists_changes.details: Changed last name to 'Ward-Test2', clicked Save, page returned to view mode showing updated name. Data persisted to database.

save_shows_toast_confirmation.details: 'Contact saved!' toast with checkmark icon appears after successful save.

save_returns_to_view_mode.details: After save, page exits edit mode and shows Edit button instead of Cancel/Save.

cancel_button_discards_changes.details: Changed name to 'CANCEL-TEST', clicked Cancel, page returned to view mode with original 'Forest Ward' name.

backend_update_with_phone_only.details: PUT /api/contacts with phone and no email returns 200 'Contact updated successfully'

backend_update_with_email_only.details: PUT /api/contacts with empty phone and email returns 200 'Contact updated successfully' - relaxed validation working

backend_profile_photo_endpoint.details: PATCH /api/contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/profile-photo with photo_url returns 200 'Profile photo updated'

verified_features: Cancel button (data-testid='contact-cancel-button') discards changes and exits edit mode
Save button (data-testid='contact-save-button') with gold background (#C9A962) persists changes
showToast('Contact saved!', 'success') displays confirmation after save
loadContact() called after save to refresh data and return to view mode
Phone is now Optional in ContactCreate model (line 293 in models.py)
PUT /api/contacts accepts phone OR email (not both required)
critical_code_review_comments: handleSave (line 786-849): Properly validates first_name required, phone OR email required, calls contactsAPI.update, shows toast, sets isEditing=false, calls loadContact()
Save button (line 1509-1511): TouchableOpacity with gold background, disabled during saving, shows ActivityIndicator when saving
Cancel button (line 1505-1507): Calls setIsEditing(false) and loadContact() to discard changes
ContactCreate model (line 290-318): phone is Optional[str] = '' allowing email-only contacts
seed_data_creation: None - used existing contact Forest Ward (69a0c06f7626f14d125f8c34)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact edit/save functionality fully working. Save button uses TouchableOpacity which may need force=True click in Playwright. Toast shows 'Contact saved!' with checkmark. Edit form fields have values that can be accessed via input[value='X'] selectors.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - not testing actual SMS sending
